qids.subject: Data Structures
qids.prose: Consider a binary tree in which every node has either zero or two children. Let be the number of nodes in . Which ONE of the following is the number of nodes in that have exactly two children? A. B. C. D.

qids.subject: Data Structures
qids.prose: Consider the following tree traversals on a full binary tree: i. Preorder ii. Inorder iii. Postorder Which of the following traversal options is/are sufficient to uniquely reconstruct the full binary tree? A. B. C. D.
